channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: BlackRock's new bitcoin ETF lets institutions earn from volatility. There's a catch.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 16, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin buyers add over 250,000 BTC between $59,000 and $67,000 as accumulation returns
item.description: Glassnode data shows broad-based buying across retail and whale cohorts, with the Accumulation Trend Score reaching its strongest level of the current drawdown.

item.title: Bitcoin rallies after Japan rate increase with XLM, INJ, UNI advancing
item.description: Stellar’s XLM, Injective’s INJ and Uniswap’s UNI ranked among the best performers in the 100 biggest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.

item.title: Bitcoin doesn't need Ethereum-style yield, says Strategy's Michael Saylor
item.description: Michael Saylor says Bitcoin does not need staking or inflation, outlining a five-layer “Digital Asset Stack” that generates returns through credit and equity products built around BTC.

item.title: How Ghana’s EOCO and the UK NCA are Using Blockchain Analysis to Return $15 Million to Fraud Victims
item.description: When an e‑commerce “investment” platform promising high-yield returns began circulating in Ghana, thousands of people signed up to run online… The post How Ghana’s EOCO and the UK NCA are Using Blockchain Analysis to Return $15 Million to …

item.title: Bitcoin miner IREN enters Europe with Nostrum acquisition as AI pivot accelerates
item.description: The acquisition adds about 490 megawatts of secured power in Spain as IREN expands beyond Bitcoin mining and builds its European AI cloud platform.

item.title: I would make one strategic change in the public framing: do not describe Digital Credit as a fixed-volatility product. Describe it as a volatility-damping layer that seeks to transform high-volatility Digital Capital into lower-volatility income through seniority, duratio - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9uLXdMOU4yejNRd1NlOE5Vc2lHUENPTTd2VUVySy1OdjQ5Zmg5XzFsVGpwaEo1WldMNWZINkVkQ216Sm51bmJTZEQtNktKZkFvTEU2M2JQRkRqaHM?oc=5" target="_blank">I would make one strategic change in the pu…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Tether Gold now has a dedicated options market on Bybit
item.description: These options, settled in USDT, let traders hedge risk, speculate on gold prices.

item.title: Bitcoin recovery rests on US-Iran deal as momentum remains weak
item.description: LVRG Research director Nick Ruck says Bitcoin could face a “volatile path” if a recently agreed peace deal between the US and Iran breaks down.

item.title: Live markets: SpaceX surges in pre-market trading as valuation climbs above Amazon's
item.description: Ether, XRP, Solana and Hyperliquid funds all took in money, but bitcoin's outflow was really just Grayscale's GBTC.

item.title: XRP gives back gains after 10% rally as traders take profit near $1.25
item.description: Asian demand and ETF inflows helped push XRP through $1.20, but the token struggled to hold its highs after running into fresh selling near a key resistance zone.

item.title: Profit-taking across bitcoin, ether, solana as traders wait on the Iran signing
item.description: A U.S.-Iran deal pulled oil lower and lifted stocks, but bitcoin's bounce is hesitant. ETF outflows just paused after a record run, and analysts say the market wants the deal signed before pricing it in.

item.title: US government watchdog urges FDIC to coordinate on crypto oversight
item.description: The US Government Accountability Office says that regulators, including the FDIC, lack an “ongoing coordination mechanism for addressing blockchain risks.”

item.title: Bitcoin rises after Bank of Japan hikes interest rates to a 31-year high
item.description: The Bank of Japan raised its key interest rate by 25 basis points to 1%, the highest level since 1995.

item.title: Anthropic shutdown makes a strong case for decentralized AI: Grayscale
item.description: Grayscale says decentralized AI tokens gained after the US government ordered Anthropic to cut access to its latest AI models, showing user demand for alternatives to centralized AI.

item.title: Trump crypto company's USD1 stablecoins backing UFC event bonuses
item.description: A spokesperson for the Democratic National Committee decried the move as “an opportunity to use the power of the presidency to make [Trump] and his family even richer.”

item.title: Elon Musk Loses Again to OpenAI as Judge Dismisses xAI Trade Secret Lawsuit
item.description: A federal judge handed Elon Musk his second defeat against OpenAI after finding xAI failed to show OpenAI improperly obtained confidential info.

item.title: Pudgy Penguins NFT Game 'Pudgy Party' Shuts Down Less Than a Year After Launch
item.description: Pudgy Party, a mobile battle royale game, has closed up shop as the Pudgy Penguins team shifts its focus to its Pudgy World experience.

item.title: 🚨 NEW: BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF ($BITA) launches tomorrow, targeting a 15–25% annual yield. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9zTm1BRDU2d3R3NkQzS1ZMUV9GVC1GZ0tFTU9LZDhkYnlOUVpvd1hOd0xjbk5lLVFOYVBYUUNTb2Izc0tDWnRmZDhrMTBNSEVKNVBFSmFUUjJ2Y2lnNGJfQzUtSVg?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NEW: BlackRock’s iShares Bit…

item.title: JUST IN: BlackRock to launch Bitcoin Premium Income ETF tomorrow. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5WQXNwYTR0T0IxU2NjUC1pYWQwSHVub1BmUmRwaDV6blREQ256ZGhCbFJOLW9oUFNOWDlIdGtCUFFuSXQ1dnU5OWxmRjloMGRsNU5hT2gtOFNwc1BJR1ltM05B?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: BlackRock to launch Bitco…

item.title: Someone Just Lost $1 Million on Polymarket Over Spain World Cup Shocker
item.description: One trader lost $1 million betting Spain would win. Another bought "No" at 9¢ and walked away with $4.3 million.

item.title: Rio de Janeiro Built an AI Model That Beat DeepSeek—But Was Based on Someone Else's Work
item.description: Rio de Janeiro released a frontier-class AI model that claimed to beat Alibaba's best. Then Nex showed up with receipts.

item.title: ALL SET: the iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF $BITA is launching TOMORROW (tue). Confirmed by Nasdaq. Also, the ETF will target 15-25% annual yield while trying to capture at least 70% of bitcoin's upside in process. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1IdXZITUM3bzdCVUJWM0RDQnlOYmVyZUpqd0FKNUJiMmlfX21wbmlXek1ydE5XZS0tVl9LdjZVUVU1bTY5MzNNek9aUG5TSGlocGF1V1BJZE1JY2dQNy1nUjhDQ2M?oc=5" target="_blank">ALL SET: the iShares Bitcoin Pr…

item.title: Nvidia’s $20 billion debt boom reinforces Bitcoin miners' AI pivot
item.description: Nvidia’s planned bond sale reinforces booming AI infrastructure demand, strengthening the case for Bitcoin miners pivoting toward AI data centers.

item.title: CFTC hires SEC crypto task force adviser with blockchain forensics chops
item.description: The CFTC staff appointment came amid the US Congress seeking to overhaul federal financial regulators’ roles over digital assets with the CLARITY Act.

item.title: Wall Street Could Boost Uniswap's Token Price Nearly 40x by 2030: Standard Chartered
item.description: Uniswap’s native token UNI is set to surge nearly fortyfold in the coming years as Wall Street migrates on-chain, Standard Chartered said.

item.title: Hyperliquid loses Anthropic, OpenAI markets as creator shuts down project
item.description: Ventuals, one of the teams behind real-world asset perpetuals on Hyperliquid, said it is closing its markets and joining another project in the ecosystem.

item.title: Anthropic Faces Lawsuit Over Allegedly Misleading Claude AI Pricing
item.description: A class action lawsuit alleges Anthropic overstated the usage limits of its Claude Max subscription plans and misled customers about savings.

item.title: BitMine boosts ETH holdings closer to $10B as bear market accumulation continues
item.description: BitMine continued buying Ether through the market downturn, growing its stake to nearly 5% of the circulating supply while generating staking yield amid mounting ecosystem challenges.

item.title: Kraken rolls out perpetual futures for US traders through CFTC-regulated venue
item.description: The offering follows Kraken's acquisition of Bitnomial and comes amid a broader push to bring crypto derivatives trading onshore.

item.title: Solana Treasury Firm Forward Industries Keeps Trying to Acquire Rivals—But Nobody's Biting
item.description: Forward Industries has been unsuccessful on all three recent attempts to combine with rival publicly traded Solana treasury firms.

item.title: Bitcoin (-27%) and Gold (-3%) are the two worst performing major assets so far in 2026. Something we haven't seen before in any calendar year. $GLD bitcoin:native Video: youtube.com/watch?v=sMF_Nh… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBqQ2trR0F1N0xrc2ltU2RoR01qYWVPcVNuMlBMTDUxckh2YjJHR2tEVkdJUmJ1cUFCMmxCcy15VEdrVUFkXzBWSHowUkxrc1BpMXdtMThXd0dNbmFVRWVUbHVqT015Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin (-27%) and Gold (-3%…

item.title: Bitcoin Capitalism — my keynote from @BTCPrague 2026. Digital Capital is the foundation for Digital Credit, Digital Money, Digital Yield, Digital Equity, and a universe of Bitcoin-backed products and services. Timestamps: 01:37 - The Four Bitcoin Ideologies a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9GSkdrQkNERm5ETWZYN0ZqbzZYUVZpU09neEpNQmVaWUdxS3FuRW1xazkxNDBVQzk4Z0hnSWNNYjZidVJseXFydTNyOU4xUGY5dnRWTXc1SnlwaWc?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin Capitalism — my keynote from @BTCPr…

item.title: Canadian PM Urges AI Diversification After US Anthropic Block, Decentralized AI Tokens Rally
item.description: The U.S. move to pull Anthropic's top models offline shows the dangers of leaning on a few AI providers, Carney said.

item.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy Pads Cash Cushion for Second Straight Week, Buys BTC
item.description: Strategy expanded its USD Reserve to $1.1 billion and increased its total Bitcoin holdings, after dipping into those funds last month.

item.title: These Bitcoin charts show how BTC price could hit $100K before October
item.description: Bitcoin’s double-bottom setup, weekly RSI divergence and whale flows put traders on alert as BTC tests a key breakout zone.

item.title: One Indicted Over Crypto ‘Wrench Attack’ in France
item.description: The crypto-related assault reportedly involved attackers posing as police officers, and follows a spate of attacks in the country.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Adds $139 Million in Ethereum Ahead of Preferred Share Trading Start
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies expanded its leading Ethereum treasury to more than 5.6 million ETH valued at greater than $10 billion.

item.title: If America wants to lead in crypto, it must protect the people who build it
item.description: Despite the Clarity Act’s advancement toward the finish line, there’s one provision under threat for builders that can’t be overlooked, argues Smith.

item.title: Bitcoin analysis warns over BTC price rejection as $67K approaches
item.description: Bitcoin snatched upside liquidity as the US trading session began, but traders warned over a failure to preserve BTC price gains.

item.title: ‘Crypto spring’ is here, says one analyst after bitcoin's key signals turn bullish
item.description: Standard Chartered analyst Geoffrey Kendrick's bullish call comes as spot bitcoin exchange-traded fund inflows return, oil prices fall and Coinbase's CEO says bitcoin likely bottomed near $60,000.

item.title: Kraken debuts U.S. perpetual futures as crypto derivatives move onshore
item.description: Perpetual futures generated more than $60 trillion in volume last year, according to the crypto exchange, largely outside the U.S.

item.title: Pudgy Penguins winds down Pudgy Party mobile game
item.description: Pudgy Penguins will halt development of Pudgy Party and focus on Pudgy World, as another Web3 gaming project shuts down after failing to find a sustainable business model.

item.title: Bybit expands RWA push with tokenized bond funds from PIMCO, CMBI
item.description: The new offering gives eligible users access to tokenized institutional bond funds as demand for blockchain-based real-world assets continues to grow.

item.title: Coinbase's Brian Armstrong says bitcoin may have bottomed at $60,000
item.description: Armstrong said his instinct is that bitcoin has probably found its floor, pointing to the four-year cycle that has historically marked lows.

item.title: XRP rockets 8% above $1.20 in first major breakout since June selloff
item.description: Heavy volume pushed XRP through multiple resistance levels, with traders now focused on whether the rally can extend toward $1.30 after weeks of defensive positioning.

item.title: What happens when AI agents start using crypto wallets?
item.description: AI agents could use crypto wallets to monitor portfolios, prepare transactions and make payments, but safeguards will be crucial.

item.title: Why the milestone represents the blockchain’s real superpowerI just returned from Asia, where I spent time with Ethereum developers and ecosystem leaders. A special call-out to Nonce Classic, Four Pillars, and DSRV in Seoul, as well as our friends at SNZ a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE0xRkZWSnhYWGJGOGZ1enMzTFFBNThwSENLZzRaR2dxRUZXbTRfdm1hZlYzQ1E1WnZnTTk3UXk5c1c1dWNHemI2OHVBQUxDaFQyOXVxWG1vMEp5aTE3M3Zn?oc=5" target="_blank">Why the milestone represents the block…

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) surges 31.9%, leading index higher
item.description: Near Protocol (NEAR), up 22.2% from Friday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Bitmine adds another $136 million of ether after raising $274 million in preferred stock sale
item.description: Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury firm, through the preferred stock sale, is using a financing tool pioneered by Michael Saylor's bitcoin treasury firm Strategy.

item.title: Morning Minute: Standard Chartered Says the Crypto Winter Is Over
item.description: The three crypto market overhangs of the Iran War, SpaceX IPO and ETF outflows appear to be lifting. But can they be trusted?

item.title: Saylor’s Strategy buys 1,587 BTC for $100M, holdings hit 846.8K
item.description: Strategy acquired 1,587 Bitcoin for $100 million last week, lifting holdings to 846,842 BTC after raising $209 million through MSTR stock sales.

item.title: Tokenization could push DeFi assets to $2.7T by 2030: Standard Chartered
item.description: Standard Chartered forecasts assets locked in decentralized finance will reach $2.7 trillion by 2030, driven by tokenization and crypto-native growth.

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy acquires another 1,587 bitcoin for $100 million
item.description: The latest purchase was made at an average price of $63,024 per bitcoin.

item.title: Markets cheer U.S.-Iran Breakthrough though Middle East risks, Fed remain in focus
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 15, 2026

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's 'Strategy' buys 1,587 Bitcoin worth $105 million. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAtaGNtNjFjN09CNXJUeXI1cVg1X3lyeDYyYnJXUFpEZkVkT1BITTE1YU9fRkhGWnNFQzVZcFRWNXI5X3BFS3pKSWVjZDU4WGE3TmJHdkdSa2VBRWJWUi04cUhn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's 'Strateg…

item.title: Philippines Issues Stricter Crypto Listing Rules, Bans Privacy Coins
item.description: The Philippines' central bank has tightened crypto oversight with new rules governing how exchanges assess and monitor digital assets.

item.title: U.S.-Iran deal lifts equities, sends oil lower, while crypto stays wary
item.description: The peace deal reached over the weekend provided the stimulus many markets had been waiting for. Crypto traders, however, have learned to distrust this particular headline

item.title: Bitcoin Tops $65K on US-Iran Deal, But Traders Remain Skeptical
item.description: A crypto relief rally has “partially arrived” as Trump announces a deal with Iran, but prediction market traders remain unconvinced.
